title: Diabetes Canada 2020 Essentials
content: • Dx: Target BP for Diabetics is <130/80. • Tx: First-line for HTN in DM: ACEi or ARB (Monitor Creatinine). NEVER combine them. • Tx: Dyslipidemia: Use Statin; add fibrate only if Triglycerides >10.0. • Tx: Painful Neuropathy: Use TCA, Anticonvulsants (Gabapentin), or Duloxetine.

title: Cancer Screening (Clinical Cards Edition)
content: • Cervical: Ages 21-65, q3y (Pap Smear). • Breast: Ages 50-74, q2y (Mammogram) - note: standard clinical card baseline. • Colon: Ages 50-75, q2y (FIT) or q10y (Colonoscopy). • AAA: One-time US for men 65-80 who ever smoked.

title: Anxiety Disorders Management
content: • Dx: GAD requires symptoms for ≥6 months. • Tx: First-line: SSRIs or SNRIs + CBT. • Warning: Use Benzodiazepines only for short-term relief due to dependence risk.

title: Abdominal Pain Approach
content: • Dx: RUQ Pain: Ultrasound for Gallbladder. RLQ Pain: CT for Appendicitis. • Risk: Always rule out Ectopic Pregnancy in females of childbearing age with abdominal pain.
